---
title: "Cells"
date: 2021-09-09
summary: '"'
trailer: "gallery/cells/preview/cell_layer_145.png"
splash:
  image: "./image/cell_layer_145.png"
  caption: "Cells"
---

<style>
.splash-caption-tweak {color: black}
</style>

```{r include=FALSE}
root <- rprojroot::find_root("_hugodown.yaml")
source(file.path(root, "themes", "hugo-diziet", "R", "diziet.R"))
```

> Layers of cellular-like features generated by ODE simulation and space tessellation.

Work in progress...

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery(preview_fmt = "png")
```
